title: Device Token Success Payload DTO
description: Success payload returned after a verified portal user approves the device authorization. The API key is project-scoped and must not carry tenant-wide privileges.

api_key.description: Project-scoped Traigent API key. Consumers display or persist the secret once; servers return only this sk_-prefixed value at issuance time.

tenant_id.description: Tenant/workspace id that owns the issued project-scoped key.

project_id.description: Default project id the issued API key is scoped to.

subscription_tier.description: Approved user's active subscription tier. `free` and legacy `hobby` are both accepted during the free-tier rollout.

trial_limit.description: Allowed trials for the current tier. -1 means unlimited.

api_call_limit.description: Allowed API calls for the current tier. -1 means unlimited.
